name: whatsapp-ai-crm
description: WhatsApp Linked-Device AI CRM with Ollama (unfiltered direct tone)

scripts.dev: npm run ensure-infra && npm run ensure-model && npm run kill-worker && npx concurrently --kill-others --names "API,WORKER" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd apps/api-server && node index.js" "cd apps/whatsapp-worker && node index.js"
scripts.dev:parallel: npm run ensure-infra && npm run ensure-model && npm run kill-worker && (command -v ./node_modules/.bin/concurrently >/dev/null && ./node_modules/.bin/concurrently --kill-others --names "API,WORKER" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd apps/api-server && node index.js" "cd apps/whatsapp-worker && node index.js" || npx concurrently --kill-others --names "API,WORKER" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd apps/api-server && node index.js" "cd apps/whatsapp-worker && node index.js")

npm run ensure-infra && npm run ensure-model && npm run kill-worker && ./node_modules/.bin/concurrently --kill-others --names "API,WORKER" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd apps/api-server && node index.js" "cd apps/whatsapp-worker && node index.js"
scripts.dev:worker: npm run kill-worker && cd apps/whatsapp-worker && node index.js
scripts.ensure-infra: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d || docker-compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.ensure-model: ollama list | grep -q direct-crm-agent || (echo 'direct-crm-agent model not found, running setup...' && npm run ollama:setup)
scripts.docker:infra: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d || docker-compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.docker:down: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down || docker-compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.docker:clean: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down --remove-orphans || docker-compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down --remove-orphans
scripts.kill-worker: lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f 'puppeteer|Google Chrome|chromium.*session' 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'Ports and browser sessions cleaned (if any were running)'
scripts.db:schema: docker exec -i whatsapp-ai-crm-postgres psql -U crmuser -d wa_crm < packages/database/schema.sql || psql -U crmuser -d wa_crm -h localhost -f packages/database/schema.sql
scripts.ollama:setup: ollama pull llama3.1:8b && ollama create direct-crm-agent -f Modelfile
scripts.install:all: npm install && (cd apps/whatsapp-worker && npm install) && (cd apps/api-server && npm install) && (cd packages/database && npm install) && (cd packages/ai-agent && npm install)
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run docker:infra && npm run ollama:setup && echo 'Setup complete. Run: npm run dev' (single command for everything)
scripts.db:reset: docker exec whatsapp-ai-crm-postgres psql -U crmuser -d wa_crm -c 'DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;' && npm run db:schema
